plugin.asset-catalog.screen.catalog.subt: Track business assets, ownership, and lifecycle status.
plugin.asset-catalog.screen.lifecycle.su: Review lifecycle transitions and current status across assets.
Type, criticality, and classification ar: Type, criticality, and classification are business-managed catalog values from `Reference catalogs`. Asset lifecycle states such as `active`, `review`, or `retired` are system-controlled.
Name: Name
Asset Detail keeps workflow, accountabil: Asset Detail keeps workflow, accountability, and governed asset changes inside one record workspace. The catalog list stays focused on browse, compare, and open.
This list stays focused on browse, compa: This list stays focused on browse, compare, and open. Ownership, workflow, and governed changes stay in Asset Detail.
This board stays focused on lifecycle st: This board stays focused on lifecycle state and transition history. Open an asset from the catalog when you need to manage ownership, evidence, or asset maintenance.
